Class AbstractPlayer

java.lang.Object
edu.univalle.cincuentazo.model.AbstractPlayer
All Implemented Interfaces:
Player
Direct Known Subclasses:
HumanPlayer, MachinePlayer
public abstract class AbstractPlayer extends Object implements Player
Base implementation shared by all player types.

      human - whether the player is human controlled

    • hasPlayableCard

      public boolean hasPlayableCard(int tableSum, int limit)
      Description copied from interface: Player
      Checks whether the player has at least one legal card.
      Specified by:
      hasPlayableCard in interface Player
      Parameters:
      tableSum - current table sum
      limit - maximum allowed table sum
      Returns:
      true when a card can be played
